footer.tagline: Secure, trustless escrow for blockchain transactions. Built for Web3, powered by smart contracts.

disclaimer.title: Protocol Transparency
disclaimer.text: Zenland is a source-available protocol governed by its community through the Zenland DAO — not a registered financial company. The protocol operates 100% non-custodially: funds go directly into audited smart contracts on Ethereum. No person or entity ever holds your funds. Because no one can access or control deposited funds, no escrow license is required.

wallet.title: Connect Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Choose your wallet to continue
wallet.installWallet: Please install a Web3 wallet to continue
wallet.sponsorBadge: Sponsored by Zenland — No gas fees
wallet.footer: By connecting, you agree to our <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>
